## Summary

Describe the user-facing change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check` in `src-tauri`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` in `src-tauri`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Privacy And Data

- [ ] No API keys are logged or written to normal config files
- [ ] Local data changes are documented
- [ ] User prompts, responses, and generated images are not included in tests or logs

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated, or not needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, or not needed

## Notes

Add screenshots, known limitations, or follow-up work if useful.
